title: Sample Desalting and Clean-up using Agilent OMIX C18 TIPS for LC-MS/MS
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fr4u","text":"Compatible with OMIX C18 pipette tips, 10 - 100 μL (Agilent, Cat# A57003100). Sample digestion details are available in the \"Denaturing On-bead Digestion for LC-MS/MS\" –protocol. Step-by-step instructions for the pull-down are available in \"Co-Immunoprecipitation/Pull-Down of C1q-Interacting Intracellular Proteins/Protein Complexes for Unbiased Forward Screen Using NanoLC-MS/MS\"-protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"bsel3","text":"*Sample digestion details are available in the Denaturing On-bead-Digestion for LC-MS/MS – protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"8ko6n","text":"OMIX C18 pipette tips, 10 - 100 μL (Agilent, Cat# A57003100)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"13txl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"usxks","text":"Required Buffers:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"n3q9e","text":"1. 100% Acetonitrile (ACN) (Sigma-Aldrich, Cat# A998-4)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uytpr","text":"2. 0.1% Formic acid (FA) (Fisher Scientific, Cat# 60-006-17)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a3zs6","text":"3. 50% ACN, 0.1% FA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eihiq","text":"4. 90% ACN, 0.1% FA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Aspirate 100 μL of 100 % Acetonitrile (ACN) (Sigma-Aldrich, Cat# A998-4) and discard the solvent — repeat (Total 2x).
Aspirate 100 μL of 0.1% Formic acid (FA) (Fisher Scientific, Cat# 60-006-17) and discard solvent — repeat (Total 3x).
Aspirate 100 μL pre-treated sample* acidified to 0.1% FA into Equilibrated OMIX Tip. *See the "Denaturing On-bead Digestion for LC-MS/MS" – protocol for details.
Dispense and aspirate the sample for 9 cycles (Total 10x).
Aspirate 100 μL of 0.1% FA buffer and discard solvent — repeat (Total 2x).
Dispense and aspirate the sample for 9 cycles (Total 10x).
Dispense and aspirate the sample for 9 cycles (total 10x).
Combine the eluent with the (50% ACN, 0.1% FA)-eluent, resulting in a final eluent concentration of 70% ACN, 0.1% FA. Concentrate the sample using a SpeedVac before LC-MS/MS.
creator: Katja Piltti
